info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: 10.63 SraRa~ ityasya ayaM pAWaBedaH sidDAntakOmudyAM pAWitaH nAsti parantu mADavIyaDAtuvfttO dfSyate

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'viSrARite PalIkaraRAnAmAcAmasyApAmiti baliM haret' (go0 gf0 1431) viSrARite datte kzIRaprAya ityarTaH
'kaTaM nu Sakyo'nunayo maharzerviSrARanAccAnyapayasvinInAm' (raGu0 254) viSrARanaM dAnam prAyeRa vipUrvo'yaM DAtuH prayujyata iti dIkzitaH
'dakziRaH kzitipatirvyaSiSraRada dakziRAH' (SiSu0 1433) vyaSiSraRat prAdAt DAturviSabdaM na vyaBicaratItyeva dyotanAya virupasargaH prayuktaH arTaM tu na kalayApi viSinazwi
